items.title: A Big Correction Would Cost Dow 10,000 Points
items.description: Last year, the S&P 500 declined 19% from its February highs to its late April lows. A wild rally took it higher for the balance of 2025, and it closed up 17% for the year. From a market risk perspective, most of the decline was attributable to a single event. This was the Donald Trump ... A Big Correction Would Cost Dow 10,000 Points
